privileged_info_summary: The input FITS file is a real astronomical image from the Hubble Space Telescope (WFPC2 instrument), downloaded from NASA GSFC FITS samples (WFPC2u5780205r_c0fx.fits, shape (4, 200, 200), max pixel value ~3740.5). It is placed at /home/ga/AstroImages/raw/hst_wfpc2_sample.fits. The task requires an agent to identify a bright star, crop an ROI (20x20 to 150x150 pixels), generate a 3D surface plot, and record stats. The expected outputs are exactly specified: psf_crop.fits, psf_surface.png, and psf_stats.txt, all in the /home/ga/AstroImages/processed/ directory. The script dynamically verifies the presence of these files and ensures the chosen crop is valid and contains a peak significantly brighter than the background.
